title: Rhumb Studio: Small but Mighty, Shaped by Curiosity
description: A two-person studio working between Bristol and Paris, redefining web design by crafting immersive, spatial experiences that feel less like pages and more like places.

title: Susurrus: Crafting a Cozy Watercolor World with Three.js and Shaders
description: A behind-the-scenes look at blending NPR shading, sound, and interaction to shape a meditative WebGL scene.

title: Building 4WIDE: Turning Distortion, Blur, and Motion into a Coherent Experience
description: A look at designing and building the 4WIDE website, exploring how distortion, blur, and motion were used to create an expressive experience while balancing clarity and performance.

title: A Playful Clip Menu with GSAP’s easeReverse
description: A playful GSAP menu demo exploring how easeReverse makes reversed UI animations feel smoother, snappier, and more intentional.

title: False Earth: From WebGL Limits to a WebGPU-Driven World
description: A deep dive into building an infinite procedural landscape using WebGPU and Three.js, where compute shaders and indirect drawing bring millions of interactive grass blades to life.

title: Interactive Storytelling for the Web: Building Immersive Stories with Timelines, 3D, and Layered Scenes
description: A step by step tutorial on creating an immersive Moon story in Instorier with motion, interaction, and 3D scene building.

title: The Art of Complex Motion: Corentin Bernadou’s World of Shaders and Experimentation
description: A story of how sharing experiments, studying shaders, and pushing animation further helped shape a distinct motion practice.

title: They Call Me Giulio: The Making of a Cinematic Cyberpunk Portfolio
description: A deep dive into four cinematic scenes, exploring how film-inspired ideas evolved into a cohesive and immersive portfolio experience.

title: Lusion: Where Digital Craft Meets Ambitious Experimentation
description: What began with one person teaching himself to make things grew into a creative practice shaped by curiosity, persistence, and the urge to push digital work further.

title: The Exat Microsite: Pushing a Typography Showcase to New Creative Extremes
description: A case study on how motion, interaction, and scroll-driven design turned the Exat microsite into an expressive showcase for contemporary type.
